goal: Suggest preprocessing and feature-engineering actions for predicting Class on anonymized biomarker data under the balanced_log_loss metric using only official competition files.

task_characteristics.analysis_notes: Small official biomarker-classification task with 617 labeled training rows, a 5-row test table, and one official train-side auxiliary lookup file (greeks.csv) keyed by Id. The benchmark-relevant case-insensitive column union across train/test/greeks is 63. Most feature columns are numeric, EJ is the only main-table categorical feature, and missingness is concentrated in BQ and EL. The curated bank intentionally keeps the primary good spine conservative: drop the identifier column, encode EJ, and handle sparse numeric missingness; wider model-specific and validation-side branches are represented outside the primary denominator. preprocessing_complexity_raw is authored as the retained good-row count before equivalence-group collapse and excludes notes-only workflow assumptions such as trimming whitespace from BD / CD / CW / FD headers.

dataset_description.summary: The official competition scope for this benchmark is limited to four CSV files already present locally: train.csv (617 rows x 58 columns), test.csv (5 rows x 57 columns), greeks.csv (617 rows x 6 columns), and sample_submission.csv (5 rows x 3 columns). train.csv contains anonymized biomarker-style features plus categorical EJ and binary target Class. greeks.csv is an official auxiliary train-side table keyed by Id with Alpha/Beta/Gamma/Delta category labels and Epsilon date-like strings. Across train/test/greeks, the case-insensitive column union is 63. Missingness is concentrated in BQ and EL, with a few single-digit gaps in CB, CC, DU, FC, FL, FS, and GL. Four official feature names contain trailing whitespace: BD , CD , CW , and FD .
dataset_description.raw_text:
Official-only benchmark scope:
- train.csv: labeled training table keyed by Id with binary target Class
- test.csv: small prediction table keyed by Id
- greeks.csv: official auxiliary metadata for training rows with Alpha, Beta, Gamma, Delta, and Epsilon
- sample_submission.csv: submission template with Id, class_0, class_1

Observed local file shape:
- train.csv: 617 x 58
- test.csv: 5 x 57
- greeks.csv: 617 x 6
- sample_submission.csv: 5 x 3

Observed data properties:
- one main categorical feature in the primary table: EJ
- missing values are concentrated in BQ and EL
- four official headers carry trailing whitespace: BD , CD , CW , FD 
- case-insensitive benchmark-relevant column union across train/test/greeks is 63
